description.overview: One of Britain's oldest terriers, Border Terriers are happy, affectionate dogs who get along well with people and other dogs.
description.history: The Border Terrier originated in England/Scotland.
description.temperament: Known for being affectionate, happy, plucky.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their wiry, dense double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: One of Britain's oldest terriers, Border Terriers are happy, affectionate dogs who get along well with people and other dogs.
